Rule.name: Toolkit-JoinerBirthrightAccess
Rule.Description:
Assigns birthright roles to newly detected identities based on department and title attributes. Role mappings are configuration-driven — update the maps below to match your organization's access model.
Trigger: Fire on identity creation or when the 'inactive' flag changes to false. Variables in scope: context (SailPointContext), identity (Identity), previousIdentity (Identity), newIdentity (Identity).
